basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bhopal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhopal (AIIMS Bhopal) Recruitment 2026: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhopal has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Madhya Pradesh. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC candidates will be applicable as per rule. Age relaxation may be given to deserving candidates by Competent Selection Committee.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR graduate/ Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course selected through National Eligibility Tests – CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE or National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MoE, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER, NISER etc.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR graduate/ Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course selected through a process described through any one of the following: a. Scholars who are selected through National Eligibility Tests – CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE. b. The selection process through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MoE, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER, NISER etc.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 43660/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Bhopal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Bhopal to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.aiims_bhopal: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR graduate/ Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course selected through National Eligibility Tests – CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE or National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MoE, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER, NISER etc.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhopal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Bhopal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR graduate/ Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course selected through a process described through any one of the following: a. Scholars who are selected through National Eligibility Tests – CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE. b. The selection process through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MoE, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER, NISER etc.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC candidates will be applicable as per rule. Age relaxation may be given to deserving candidates by Competent Selection Committee.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 43660/- per month

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Bhopal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Bhopal to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhopal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Bhopal JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts at AIIMS Bhopal is 14 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in AIIMS Bhopal JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post in the AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026. This is a contractual government job opportunity in Madhya Pradesh.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the JRF post at AIIMS Bhopal?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post is 35 years. Age relaxation for reserved categories like SC/ST/OBC will be applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for a Junior Research Fellow (JRF) at AIIMS Bhopal?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position will receive a salary of Rs. 43660/- per month. The overall salary range mentioned is Rs. 37000 - 43660 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the required qualification for AIIMS Bhopal JRF posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science or a graduate/Post Graduate Degree in a Professional Course selected through National Eligibility Tests like CSIR-UGC NET (including lectureship) and GATE, or other national-level examinations.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for AIIMS Bhopal JRF Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post at AIIMS Bhopal includes a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates must perform well in both stages to be considered for selection.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Bhopal JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the AIIMS Bhopal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q8. When is the Written Test/Interview for AIIMS Bhopal JRF?
faq.answer: The Written Test/Interview for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at AIIMS Bhopal is scheduled for 21 July 2026. Candidates should prepare accordingly and keep track of official announcements.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the AIIMS Bhopal JRF vacancy?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply online for the AIIMS Bhopal JRF Recruitment 2026. The application link will be available on the official website, www.aiimsbhopal.edu.in, and also provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location for the AIIMS Bhopal JRF post?
faq.answer: The job location for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post will be Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. AIIMS Bhopal is located at Pincode 462020, offering a government job opportunity in the state.
